cases.prompt: 내 앱에 Claude vs Gemini 중에 뭐 쓰는 게 나아?

assertions.text: Weighs cost, latency, context window, and modality.
Recommends primary/secondary/low-cost candidates with concrete API model IDs.

cases.prompt: Should my mobile app run the model on-device or via API?

assertions.text: Explicitly covers the on-device vs API tradeoff (privacy/cost/latency).
Proposes a routing / fallback / caching strategy.

cases.prompt: 이 스택 내부 작업을 어떤 모델로 라우팅할지 정해줘

assertions.text: Distinguishes itself from model-router (internal stack routing); this skill is for the user's PRODUCT model choice.
